mapper.select: SELECT id, subject_id, type, content, options, answer, create_time FROM question WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY id
SELECT id, subject_id, type, content, options, answer, create_time FROM question WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question (subject_id, type, content, options, answer) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{type}, #{content}, #{options}, #{answer})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId}
